content.text:
[Workflow Task from Orchestrator]
Workflow ID: 49ab4559-bbd
Subtask ID: 80c50b0c
Priority: 1

Task: TASK: Market Research & Competitive Intelligence for King AI v2. DELIVERABLE: 5-page competitive analysis report comparing Clio, LawGeex, Kira, and generic AI contract tools. SPECIFICATIONS: Include pricing, features, weaknesses, and market gaps. Focus on SMB law firm segment (1-50 attorneys). Include screenshot evidence of competitor pricing pages. METRIC: Minimum 4 competitors analyzed with pricing tables.

content.thinking:
The user wants me to do market research on AI contract tools for law firms, specifically comparing Clio, LawGeex, and Kira. I need to:

1. First, let me check my existing sessions and see if my workers are available
2. Then I'll orchestrate the research task using my agentic workers (agentic-1 through agentic-4)
3. I should search for pricing, features, weaknesses for each competitor
4. Take screenshots of pricing pages
5. Create a comprehensive 5-page competitive analysis report

Let me start by:
1. Checking the current session status
2. Listing available workers/sessions
3. Then I'll parallelize the research across my workers

The deadline is strict - "no delays, no clarifying questions." So I need

content.text: I'll immediately deploy my workers to parallelize this competitive intelligence gathering. Starting with competitor research and pricing page

arguments.query: Clio contract management AI pricing SMB law firms 2025
LawGeex AI contract review pricing features law firms
Kira Systems contract analysis pricing iManage acquisition
Harvey AI legal contract tool pricing features 2025

Web search tool is unavailable. I'll need to use browser-based navigation for competitive research. Let me proceed directly with my workers for document analysis and browser-based research. I'll spawn sub-agents to help gather this intelligence.

 Only available in the United States. Contact your sales representative for pricing.

### Industry-leading security

 We ensure that your communications are secure using bank-grade 256-bit SSL encryption. All of Clio’s infrastructure is hosted using physically secure, managed data centers that meet the rigid SSAE 16 specifications. Geo-redundant backups are performed multiple times per day, and site security and privacy are routinely audited by respected third parties.

### Data redundancy and exporting

 Clio supports data portability, backups, and exports. Any information put into your Clio account can be retrieved, at any time, in convenient non-proprietary, open formats.

### New features and product updates

 We are continually working to ensure that Clio remains the leading and most innovative cloud-based practice management system available. Thanks to valued feedback from customers like you, product improvements and updates are integrated seamlessly several times per month.

### Customer training and 24/5 support

 With Clio, you get unlimited free access to training and support resources. Our comprehensive learning material includes product walkthroughs, how-to videos, and FAQs.

 Our knowledgeable support team is also available to provide flexible support as needed 24/5—that’s all day and all night from Monday morning to Friday evening.

### Cancellation policy

 Although we hope you’ll find Clio a good fit for your practice management needs, you can discontinue a subscription at any time. However, there are no refunds for the current term (monthly or annually).

### Book a live demo

 Book a live demo to see how Clio can help your law firm maximize efficiency and increase revenue.

### Try Clio for free

 Try Clio’s legal software free for 7 days with no obligation. Easy setup. No credit card required. Cancel anytime.

 Only available in the United States. Contact your sales representative for pricing.

### Industry-leading security

 We ensure that your communications are secure using bank-grade 256-bit SSL encryption. All of Clio’s infrastructure is hosted using physically secure, managed data centers that meet the rigid SSAE 16 specifications. Geo-redundant backups are performed multiple times per day, and site security and privacy are routinely audited by respected third parties.

### Data redundancy and exporting

 Clio supports data portability, backups, and exports. Any information put into your Clio account can be retrieved, at any time, in convenient non-proprietary, open formats.

### New features and product updates

 We are continually working to ensure that Clio remains the leading and most innovative cloud-based practice management system available. Thanks to valued feedback from customers like you, product improvements and updates are integrated seamlessly several times per month.

### Customer training and 24/5 support

 With Clio, you get unlimited free access to training and support resources. Our comprehensive learning material includes product walkthroughs, how-to videos, and FAQs.

 Our knowledgeable support team is also available to provide flexible support as needed 24/5—that’s all day and all night from Monday morning to Friday evening.

### Cancellation policy

 Although we hope you’ll find Clio a good fit for your practice management needs, you can discontinue a subscription at any time. However, there are no refunds for the current term (monthly or annually).

### Book a live demo

 Book a live demo to see how Clio can help your law firm maximize efficiency and increase revenue.

### Try Clio for free

 Try Clio’s legal software free for 7 days with no obligation. Easy setup. No credit card required. Cancel anytime.
<<<END_EXTERNAL_UNTRUSTED_CONTENT id="f16340beb91f2589">>>
